description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a long, fitted coat with a high collar, layered over a shirt and slim pants. The coat extends to mid-thigh and features a tailored, urban style, while the pants are close-fitting and tucked into ankle-high boots. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly apart. The face is clean-shaven with defined features, and the hairstyle is short and neatly styled. The overall appearance suggests a modern, city-dwelling pedestrian, possibly in a business or casual urban setting. The clothing and posture indicate readiness for movement and interaction within a street or sidewalk environment.
description: A modern adult male in a long, tailored coat, slim pants, and boots, with short styled hair and a clean-shaven face. The figure stands upright with arms extended, dressed for an urban environment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, high-collared coat, shirt, and pants, with arms extended and boots visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length and fit of the coat, and the side silhouette of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the coat's seam details, and the straight alignment of the legs and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, coat drape, and the side of the boots.
attribute_clothing_type: long tailored coat over a shirt and slim pants, ankle-high boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
